verses.text: Abram kum sawmkualekua a phak ciangin ama tungah Topa kilang a, “Kei, Vanglian Pasian ka hi hi. Hoihtakin gamta in la, paubaang kei in
Nang tawh thuciamna ka bawl ding a, nang tampi tak kong phasak ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Abram mai kunsuk hi. Pasian in ama kiangah
“En in, nang tungah hih thuciamna kong bawl hi: Nang pen minam honpite' pa na hi ding hi
Na min Abram hi nawnlo ding a, Abraham hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh minam honpite' pa-in nang kong bawl khin hi
Keimah in suanlekhak tampi kong neisak ding hi. Nang sung panin minamte ka piangsak ding a, nang sung panin kumpite hong piangkhia ding hi
“Nang leh nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte tungah Pasian hihna ding tawntung thuciamna dingin kei leh nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte' tungah amau' khang tawntungin ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi
Nangma tung leh nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte tungah tawlkhat na omna Kanaan leitang khempeuh na neih tawntung dingun kong pia ding a, kei pen amaute' Pasian ka hi ding hi,” a ci hi
Pasian in Abraham' kiangah, “Nang leh nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte in zong ka thuciamna na zuih ding uh nong thukim ding uh ahi hi
Hih pen nang leh nang' khit cianga na suanlekhakte' zuih ding keima thuciamna ahi hi: Note' lak panin pasal peuhmah a vun ki-at ding hi
Note' vun dawn ki-at ding a, tua pen kei leh note' kikalah thuciamna lim khat hi ding hi

Note' lak panin ni giat a pha peuhmahpa a vun ki-at ding hi. Note' khang tawntungin pasal peuhmah, note' inn sunga suak hita leh, note' ta a hilo, gamdang mi khatpeuh kiang panin na sum uh tawh na lei uh hita leh
na inn sunga suak hita leh, na sum tawh a kileipa hita leh a vun ki-at tuak ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin tawntung thuciamna ahi keima thuciamna pen nomau' satak sungah om ding hi
A vun dawn a ki-at lo pasal peuhmah a mipihte kiang panin kihawlkhia ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in keima thuciamna palsat hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Pasian in Abraham' kiangah, “Na zi Sarai ahih leh, ama min Sarai na ci nawn kei ding a, ama min Sarah hi ding hi
Amah thupha ka pia ding a, amah tawh tapa khat kong pia ding hi. Amah thupha ka pia ding a, amah, minamte' nu hi ding hi. Mihingte' kumpite ama sung pan hong piangkhia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Abraham mai kun sukin nui a, amahmah tungah, “Kum za a pha pasal khat in ta nei ding ahi hiam? Kum sawmkua a pha Sarah in ta nei ding ahi hiam?” kici hi
Abraham in Pasian' kiangah, “Ishmael hong nungtasak peuh lecin,” a ci hi

Pasian in, “Hilo hi. Na zi Sarah in nang-a' dingin tapa khat nei ding a, ama min Isaac na phuak ding hi. Ama khit cianga a suanlekhakte-a' dingin tawntung thuciamna dingin ka thuciamna amah tawh ka kipsak ding hi
Ishmael-a' ding na ngetna ahih leh ka za khin hi. En in, amah thupha pia-in ka pungsak ding a, tampi tak ka phasak ding hi. Amah pen ulian sawmlenihte' pa hi ding a, minam lian khatin ka bawl ding hi
Ahih hangin, kumkik tuhun ciangin Sarah' sung panin nang-a' dinga hong suak ding Isaac tawh ka thuciamna ka kipsak ding hi,” a ci hi
Amah tawh a kiho a man khit ciangin Abraham' kiang panin Pasian paikhia to hi

Tua ciangin Abraham in a tapa Ishmael leh ama sum tawh a lei hita leh ama inn sunga suak hita leh a sila, ama inn sunga om mite' lak panin pasal khempeuh samin, Pasian in ama tunga a gensa bangin tua ni mahmahin amaute' vun dawn a atsak hi
Ama vun dawn a ki-atin Abraham kum sawmkualekua pha ta hi
Ama vun dawn a ki-atin a tapa Ishmael kum sawmlethum a pha hi
Tua ni mahmahin Abraham leh a tapa Ishmael a vun uh ki-at hi
Ama inn sunga pasal khempeuh, inn sunga suak hita leh gamdang mite' tung panin sum tawh a kilei mite hita leh, amah tawh a vun uh ki-at khawm hi.
